message:
feat(circuit-breaker): add epoch tracking to HalfOpen state to prevent stale probe poisoning

Introduces an epoch counter to the HalfOpen circuit breaker state that
prevents stale probes from a previous open/half-open cycle from being
counted toward the current recovery cycle. The epoch is derived from the
times_opened counter (masked to 24 bits) and stored in the packed u64
state representation.

Bit layout change in State::to_bits/from_bits for HalfOpen:
- Previously: tag(8) | probes_active(24) | successes(32)
- Now:        tag(8) | epoch(24) | probes_active(16) | successes(16)

MAX_HALF_OPEN_PROBES reduced from 0x00FF_FFFF (24-bit) to 0xFFFF
(16-bit) to accommodate the new epoch field. The epoch is set when
transitioning from Open to HalfOpen and threaded through probe permit
acquisition to ensure that probes from a previous cycle are rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
